textByHashes.f3b71ac6c270f76a556e61a5752c87b1d1540200: Sire, this is the one who has been honoured with a Fremennik name. A rare honour indeed, for an outlander.
textByHashes.e7ce56bbb9e4a79654ebbed8627505684770a6aa: Sire, surely that isn't necessary! Anyone who has done the Fremennik Trials can be trusted.
textByHashes.aa05dc9e025fd7d46b65838e6e2c09466d86f84f: I apologise for speaking out of turn. The Burgher is wise as always.
